# CineWorkflo - AI Video Prompts for Filmmakers

## Overview

CineWorkflo is a curated library of 150+ professional AI video prompts for Runway Gen-2, Pika Labs, and other AI video generation tools. Created by filmmakers who've worked with Netflix, BBC, and major studios.

## Core URLs

- Home: https://cineworkflo.com/
- Prompt Vault: https://cineworkflo.com/prompts
- Shot to Prompt: https://cineworkflo.com/shot-to-prompt
- Camera Moves Guide: https://cineworkflo.com/camera-moves
- Pricing: https://cineworkflo.com/pricing
- About: https://cineworkflo.com/about
- Contact: https://cineworkflo.com/contact
- Privacy: https://cineworkflo.com/privacy
- Terms: https://cineworkflo.com/terms

## What We Offer

- **150+ Tested Prompts**: Each prompt professionally written and tested for commercial use
- **Shot-to-Prompt AI**: Upload any image and get an optimized prompt
- **Smart Search**: Filter by tool (Runway, Pika), style, mood, shot type
- **One-Click Copy**: Copy prompts instantly to your clipboard
- **Workflow Templates**: Complete prompt sequences for scenes

## Who It's For

- Filmmakers and video creators
- Content creators using AI video tools
- Production companies exploring AI workflows
- Agencies needing quick video concepts

## Tools Supported

- Runway Gen-2
- Pika Labs
- Stable Video Diffusion
- Other AI video generators

## Pricing

$49 one-time purchase for lifetime access to all prompts + future updates.

## Contact

- Website: https://cineworkflo.com
- Support: Available via website contact

## Content Policy

All prompts are original, tested content designed for commercial video production. No NSFW or harmful content.

## Indexing Guidance

- Public marketing and educational pages are intended to be indexed.
- Transactional success/checkout states are not intended as evergreen content pages.
